instruction: Help me enter the marketing campaign into the campaign tracker

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Marketing Campaign Plan
Campaign Name: Spring Renewal Festival
Campaign ID: MKT-2025-S03
Campaign Period: 2025-03-20 to 2025-04-05
Channels: Online + Offline
Budget: 150K CNY
Expected Participants: 50000
Expected GMV: 2M CNY
Campaign Lead: Ye Si' > /home/user/Desktop/marketing_event.txt

python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.Workbook(); ws = wb.active; ws['A1'] = 'Campaign ID'; ws['B1'] = 'Campaign Name'; ws['C1'] = 'Period'; ws['D1'] = 'Budget(10K CNY)'; ws['E1'] = 'Expected GMV(10K CNY)'; ws['F1'] = 'Lead'; wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/campaign_tracker.xlsx')"

phases.instruction: Help me enter the marketing campaign into the campaign tracker

Fill the campaign information from /home/user/Desktop/marketing_event.txt into /home/user/Desktop/campaign_tracker.xlsx row 2: A2='MKT-2025-S03', B2='Spring Renewal Festival', C2='2025-03-20 to 2025-04-05', D2=15, E2=200, F2='Ye Si', save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/campaign_tracker.xlsx'); s = df.to_string(); print('PASSED' if 'MKT-2025-S03' in s else 'FAILED')"
